posts.author: cbandcoop (Matt Mahood @ cb+coop)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dynamic Value Conditions

Member/admin has the ability to apply conditions to a dynamic value in a monday doc. For example: Return the value of this column at any given time for the Group X. In this scenario I only have one item in each group due to automations, etc. So, another type of condition I would request is “return the item value with the most recent date”. As I type this I realize this is a more detailed request.
